headline: Psoriasis Treatment in Chennai -- Long-Term, Evidence-Based Management
subheadline: Psoriasis is a chronic condition -- we build a sustained management plan, not a promise of a one-time fix.
metaDescription: Psoriasis diagnosis and long-term management in KK Nagar, Chennai from AIIMS-trained dermatologists. Book a consultation.

whyPatientsChoose.title: Long-Term Management Focus
whyPatientsChoose.description: We build treatment plans around sustained control of flares, matched to your extent and severity.

whyPatientsChoose.title: Full Range of Treatment Options
whyPatientsChoose.description: From topical therapy to phototherapy to systemic treatment referral, matched to how extensive your psoriasis is.

symptoms: Scalp scaling not responding to dandruff shampoo

educationalInsight.title: Psoriasis Is Not Contagious -- Here's What It Actually Is
educationalInsight.body: Psoriasis is a chronic autoimmune condition, not an infection. It causes skin cells to build up rapidly, forming thick, scaly patches, and cannot be spread through contact.

steps: Skin examination and assessment of extent (body surface area involved)

doctorsPerspectiveStructured.patientConcern: Will I have to deal with this forever?
doctorsPerspectiveStructured.response: Psoriasis is a long-term condition with a relapsing-remitting course, but that doesn't mean it controls your life. With the right sustained plan, most patients get flares well under control and manage the condition effectively over the years.

processSteps.title: Evaluation
processSteps.description: Skin examination, extent assessment, and screening for joint involvement.

processSteps.title: Treatment Plan
processSteps.description: Topical, phototherapy, or systemic treatment matched to your specific extent and severity.

processSteps.title: Long-Term Follow-Up
processSteps.description: Ongoing management to track flares and adjust treatment as your condition evolves.

landingFaqs.question: Is psoriasis contagious?
landingFaqs.answer: No, psoriasis is not contagious. It's a chronic autoimmune condition, not an infection.

landingFaqs.question: Can psoriasis be cured?
landingFaqs.answer: Current treatment focuses on sustained, long-term control rather than a permanent cure. Most patients do well with an ongoing management plan.

landingFaqs.question: Does psoriasis affect joints?
landingFaqs.answer: It can -- psoriatic arthritis sometimes accompanies skin psoriasis. We specifically screen for this at your evaluation.

learnMoreLink.text: Learn more about psoriasis and treatment options
